message:
chore: move Cloudflare Pages deploy scripts into scripts/

The three deploy*.sh files at the repo root are real and load-bearing
(they wrap the wrangler-based deploy of the spec-evolution
visualization to Cloudflare Pages), but their natural home is under
scripts/ alongside the existing 50+ verify_*.sh and bd_*_e2e.sh helper
scripts. Their root-level placement was historical, not functional.

- deploy.sh -> scripts/deploy.sh (canonical deploy with health checks
  against frankensqlite.com)
- deploy_all.sh -> scripts/deploy_all.sh (deploys to all configured
  Cloudflare Pages mirrors)
- deploy_fix.sh -> scripts/deploy_fix.sh (workaround helper invoked
  when wrangler authentication state needs a reset)

No invocations elsewhere in the repo (verified via grep across *.md,
*.json, *.yml, *.sh) so this is a pure relocation. Anyone with a
muscle-memory `./deploy.sh` will need to update to
`./scripts/deploy.sh`; the new path matches every other operator
script in the repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
